name: ripple
description: Open-source video-making toolkit for agents: local perception, a complete creative workflow, persistent taste, verifiable edits, and professional handoff.

interface.shortDescription: Give agents the tools, skill, and taste to make video
interface.longDescription: Ripple helps Codex make video from a brief, existing footage, or both. Its local CLI turns media into agent-readable evidence, its skill carries the workflow from creative direction through delivery, and VIDEO.md preserves the user's taste. Ripple can plan, produce, edit, verify, repair, render, and hand off structured timelines to an NLE.
defaultPrompt: Make a concise video from this brief and available footage, then verify it.
Repair this mistimed scene without rebuilding the rest of the edit.
Inspect this render for cut, color, and audio problems.
